EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Onboarding Pack
EmailTemplate.subject: Let's get you Onboarded with Alliance Rural & Remote Health
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
LET'S GET YOU ONBOARDED.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Everything is looking good so far! Next step is to get your certificates and other compliance documents added to your Alliance Profile.
START ONBOARDING
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to call us on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
